reviews.review_msg: Incredible professor, one of the best I've had at SFU by far. He's always willing to work with you if something ever comes up such as extending deadlines if need be. If there are tweaks that need to be made on assignments, he'll ask the class for opinions. Highly recommend having him as a professor.

Rupak was awesome! Such a caring and wonderful professor to have. Lectures were interesting and interactive, I loved the class because it almost felt like we were a community. The course itself wasn't that hard, 1 1500 paper, 1 group project, and a final. I am definitely going to miss this class!
